description: Governed-state surface map for this instance. Copy this file to users/<instance-id>/governed-state/surface-map.json and update instance_id.
_instructions: Replace <your-instance-id>. Remove this _instructions field before committing.

surfaces.description: Who this instance is: instance record, owner, purpose, capabilities, operational bridges.
Communication style, tone preferences, persona notes.
What to capture, what to retain, deduplication rules, archiving thresholds.
Recurring operator flows: review cadence, capture habits, promotion triggers.
Tool configurations, MCP client settings, AI gateway preferences.
How to weight and trust different information sources.
Bridge rules for Supabase and any other runtime connections.

surface_status_values.active: Surface has canonical governed-state artifacts. Changes require proposals.
surface_status_values.stub: Surface directory exists. No governed artifacts yet. Populated through approved proposals.
surface_status_values.deprecated: Surface is no longer used. Retained for historical reference.
